name: Connector Enhancement Request

assignees: ''

## Connector Name
<!-- Which connector does this enhancement apply to? e.g. ga4, shopify, stripe -->


## Use Case
<!-- What are you trying to accomplish? Be specific about the query or workflow. -->


## Current Workaround
<!-- How are you handling this today, if at all? What's the friction? -->


## Business Impact
<!-- What does this unlock for your team or your operators? Revenue impact, time saved, decisions enabled? -->


## Additional Context
<!-- Optional: links, screenshots, API docs references, example payloads -->
